calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Plaintiff, Cross Defendant SANDRA GILLETTE present.
Respondent, Defendant, Cross Complainant SOPHIE LAU for LAU INVESTMENT GROUP also present.

10:06am The cause comes on regularly for trial de novo in Dept. 514 as assigned by the Department of the Presiding Judge. The parties are sworn.

Sophie Lau testifies on behalf of Laus Investment Group, Respondent/Cross-Complainant.

Sandra Gillette testifies on behalf of herself as Appellant/Cross-Defendant.

Exhibits are ordered returned.

12:07pm The Court grants LAU INVESTMENT GROUP, by SOPHIE LAU, $5,000.00 and $68.00 costs on the cross complaint. Further, the Court grants SANDRA GILLETTE $4,030.00 on the complaint and issues a Judgment as follows:

JUDGMENT IS ORDERED in favor of LAU INVESTMENT GROUP and aganst SANDRA GILLETTE in the amount of $970.00 principal and $68.00 costs for a total Judgment in the amount of $1,038.00.

Judge Thomas J. Mellon, Jr., Clerk: V. Mack, Not Reported (Dept 514)
